LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MARIA ALVARADO, ROBERTO MEJIA AND HECTOR ALVARADO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OR SET ASIDE STIPULATION; AND REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE: MOTION TO COMPEL. MATTER DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE PARTIES APPEARING STIPULATE TO JUDGE WESTERFIELD, OF J.A.M.'S, BEING APPOINTED AS THE ARBITRATOR. COURT ORDERS THE MATTER TO ARBITRATION AND APPOINTS JUDGE WESTERFIELD AS THE ARBITRATOR. COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET WITH JUDGE WESTERFIELD WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS AND SIGN NECESSARY DOCUMENTS TO FACILITATE ARBITRATION. NON-APPEARING COUNSEL ARE DEEMED AS HAVING WAIVED THEIR OBJECTIONS TO THE APPOINTMENT OF ARBITRATOR. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Or Set Aside Stipulation; Points And Authorities; Declaration; And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MARIA ALVARADO, ROBERTO MEJIA AND HECTOR ALVARADO'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OR SET ASIDE STIPULATION; AND REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE: MOTION TO COMPEL.
APPEARANCES: CHRISTINA TOUR-SARKISSIAN, ESQUIRE (TOUR-SARKISSIAN LAW OFFICE, 415.626.7744) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DENNIS J. KELLY, ESQUIRE (DILLINGHAM & MURPHY, 415.397.2700) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS CAMERON JONES REALTY AND KATYA JAEN. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED AND THE COURT ADOPTS AND MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE PARTIES APPEARING STIPULATE TO JUDGE WESTERFIELD, OF J.A.M.'S, BEING APPOINTED AS THE ARBITRATOR. COURT ORDERS THE MATTER TO ARBITRATION AND APPOINTS JUDGE WESTERFIELD AS THE ARBITRATOR. COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET WITH JUDGE WESTERFIELD WITHIN FIFTEEN DAYS AND SIGN NECESSARY DOCUMENTS TO FACILITATE ARBITRATION. NON-APPEARING COUNSEL ARE DEEMED AS HAVING WAIVED THEIR OBJECTIONS TO THE APPOINTMENT OF ARBITRATOR. (302/PJM/KD) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
